Item Name: Spanglish Asadero Carne Asada Seasoning - Made with Serrano Chili, Garlic & Citrus - 8 oz
Bullet Point 1: Authentic Mexican Flavor: This carne asada seasoning blend captures the bold and zesty flavors of traditional Mexican cuisine with a fiery kick from select chili peppers.
Bullet Point 2: Versatile Seasoning: Perfect for marinating and seasoning beef, chicken, pork, or vegetables before grilling, sautéing, or roasting for mouthwatering carne asada tacos, fajitas, and more.
Bullet Point 3: Robust Blend: A harmonious fusion of garlic, citrus, and signature spices creates a rich, savory taste.
Bullet Point 4: Convenient Jar: The 8 oz resealable jar ensures freshness and makes it easy to have this flavorful seasoning on hand for your favorite Mexican-inspired dishes.
Bullet Point 5: No Artificial Ingredients: Made with high-quality spices and no artificial colors, flavors, or preservatives for a pure, genuine taste experience.
Product Description: Spice up your culinary adventures with Spanglish Asadero's Carne Asada seasoning blend! This vibrant jar packs a punch of bold flavors, blending the smoky essence of New Mexico chili peppers with the zesty notes of garlic and citrus. Crafted to elevate your grilled meats, this versatile seasoning adds an authentic Mexican flair to your favorite dishes. Sprinkle it over steaks, chicken, or vegetables before grilling for a mouthwatering char and irresistible aroma. With a net weight of 8 oz (226g), this jar offers ample seasoning for multiple culinary adventures. Embrace the rich cultural fusion and tantalize your taste buds with every bite. Elevate your backyard barbecues or indoor grilling sessions with this flavorful blend that celebrates the best of Latin American cuisine.
Value: 8.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: A versatile, authentic Mexican seasoning blend positioned as a mid-range product with no premium indicators. The 8 oz glass jar with resealable lid suggests quality packaging, while the focus on natural ingredients and bold flavors supports a moderately priced offering. No certifications or organic claims are visible, aligning with a standard spice market segment.

catalog_content:
Item Name: Sadaf Garbanzo Beans - Chickpeas for Cooking and Food Flavoring - Canned Chickpeas - Kosher and Nutritious - 20 oz Jar
Bullet Point 1: VERSATILE: Expand your culinary creativity with our canned garbanzo beans. From salads to curries, these beans are a versatile addition to countless recipes, providing texture and flavor enhancement.
Bullet Point 2: NUTRITIOUS: Enjoy a powerhouse of nutrition with these garbanzo beans. Packed with protein, fiber, and essential vitamins and minerals, they're a wholesome choice for a balanced diet, promoting overall well-being.
Bullet Point 3: READY-TO-USE: Experience ultimate convenience with our canned garbanzo beans. Skip the soaking and cooking process; these beans are conveniently preserved, ready to be included in your favorite dishes, saving you time and effort in the kitchen.
Bullet Point 4: KOSHER CERTIFIED: Trust in our commitment to strict kosher standards, ensuring adherence to dietary preferences
Bullet Point 5: ABUNDANT SUPPLY: Embrace a generous quantity in each 20 oz jar. Whether you're preparing a family meal or stocking your pantry for multiple recipes, our ample supply ensures you'll have enough beans for various culinary adventures without running out.
Product Description: Our canned beans are a delicious and nutritious way to add plant-based protein and dietary fiber to your meals. Each 20 oz can contains premium quality chickpeas that have been carefully selected and cooked to perfection.These garbanzo beans have a homemade taste that will make you forget they came from a can. They are versatile and can be enjoyed in a variety of ways. Their nutty and slightly sweet flavor makes them perfect for adding to salads, soups, and stews. You can also serve them as a side dish or use them as a main ingredient in dishes like hummus or falafel.Sadaf Garbanzo Beans are a great choice for those who are looking to transition towards a vegetarian lifestyle as they provide a filling and nutritious source of protein. With our canned beans, you can enjoy the benefits of chickpeas without spending hours in the kitchen. Simply open the can, rinse the beans, and enjoy in your favorite recipe.
Value: 20.0
Unit: Fl Oz
overall_summary: Standard canned chickpeas from a recognizable brand, positioned as a versatile, ready-to-use ingredient for home cooking. Mid-range pricing expected due to convenience, nutrition claims, and kosher certification. Basic metal can packaging with no premium indicators suggests a budget-friendly, everyday pantry staple.
